arts.ttl: Aston Villa ticket prices criticised in Parliament after Keir Starmer comments
arts.sum: Labour MP for Redditch Christopher Bloore raised his concerns about Aston Villa's extortionate Champions League ticket prices in Parliament on Thursday. At the end of last month, Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he understood the concerns of supporters who were left angered by Villa's Champions League ticket prices.

arts.ttl: Thomas Hitzlsperger wades in on Jhon Duran debate and questions Unai Emery plan
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa midfielder Thomas Hitzlsperger has questioned whether Unai Emery needs to make room for Jhon Duran in his starting XI. That recipe with Ollie Watkins starting and Duran coming on, why would you change it if it works?"

arts.ttl: The contract status of every Aston Villa player shows what Monchi is building
arts.sum: Since August 2023, six current first-team players have penned new deals with John McGinn, Ezri Konsa Ollie Watkins all committed their futures last year. Leon Bailey penned a new contract in February, before Villa moved to secure Emi Martinez until 2029 at the end of August.
